sources.title: Perplexity AI grows revenue 5x to $500 million with just 34% team expansion
claims: Perplexity reached $500M ARR in April 2026 — a 5x increase from $100M ARR in early 2025
+335% YoY revenue growth while headcount grew only 34%
Growth accelerated by February 2026 launch of Computer agentic product and usage-based pricing tier
Valued at $20B — approximately 40x ARR multiple

sources.title: AI Search Engine Market Size to Hit USD 182.17 Billion by 2035
claims: AI search engine market valued at $16.30B in 2025
Projected to reach $182.17B by 2035 at 27.3% CAGR (2026–2035)
North America holds the largest share driven by Google, Microsoft, OpenAI investments

sources.title: Gartner Predicts Search Engine Volume Will Drop 25% by 2026, Due to AI Chatbots and Other Virtual Agents
claims: Traditional search engine volume to drop 25% by 2026 due to AI chatbots
Search marketing to lose market share to AI chatbots and other virtual agents
Published February 2024 — now corroborated by actual 2025–2026 data showing Google search-related share declining

sources.title: Top Generative AI Chatbots by Market Share — May 2026
claims: ChatGPT holds 60.7% of AI chatbot/search market share as of May 2026
Google Gemini holds 15.0%; Microsoft Copilot 13.2%; Perplexity 5.8%; Claude 4.1%
ChatGPT experienced a 19+ percentage point decline from its earlier near-monopolistic position

sources.title: Google's 90% Search Monopoly Faces DOJ Breakup [2026]
claims: DOJ April 2026 remedies finalized: Google prohibited from exclusive search distribution contracts
Google must share search index and user-interaction data with qualified rivals
Remedies extend to Google GenAI products including Gemini app distribution
Court rejected immediate Chrome/Android divestiture proposals but ordered behavioral remedies

sources.title: AI Search Market 2026: Key Figures and Market Share Stats
claims: 1.13 billion AI referral visits with +357% year-over-year growth
Google's share of search-related activity fell from 89% (2023) to 71% (Q4 2025)
AI platforms now taking 15–20% of informational query volume from traditional search

sources.title: AI Search Trends 2025–2026: Data, Stats & Strategies for Marketers
claims: Google AI Overviews reach 2 billion monthly users across 200 countries in 40 languages
93% zero-click rate in Google AI Mode queries
58.5% of all Google searches end in zero clicks
Google searches per user dropped nearly 20% year-on-year in 2025

sources.title: Perplexity AI Stats May 2026: Uses, Users, Market Share, and More
claims: Perplexity serves 100M+ monthly active users as of 2026
780 million monthly queries as of May 2025 (+340% year-over-year)
Perplexity backed by Jeff Bezos, NVIDIA, SoftBank, and IVP
$20B valuation; fastest-growing pure-play AI search company

sources.title: History of AI Search: A Timeline from 2022 to 2026
claims: Perplexity AI launched December 7, 2022 as the first answer engine with inline citations
Microsoft Bing Chat launched February 7, 2023 — 1 million waitlist signups in 48 hours
Google Bard demo error (Feb 6, 2023) wiped $100B from Alphabet's market cap
By January 2026, AI search reached 910 million monthly users across all platforms

sources.title: AI Search Engines Report 2026: Market Trends, User Trust, and Platform Rankings
claims: 58% of Gen Z and millennial users prefer AI-generated summaries over traditional search results
65.9% of users say citations boost trust, yet only 27% click them often
48.8% of users do not verify sources if the AI answer sounds credible
ChatGPT Search processes 250–500M weekly queries per Similarweb 2026 report

unverified_claims.claim: search_volume: 110K+/mo — estimated from aggregated keyword data for 'AI search engine', 'AI search', 'Perplexity AI', and related terms; no single verified keyword tool data available for the combined topic cluster

growth_3m: +38% — estimated proxy based on Perplexity ARR trajectory ($200M Nov 2025 → $500M Apr 2026 = +150% in 5 months), weighted against slower-growing market participants; represents overall AI search market 3-month growth approximation
Claude.ai Search market share: 4.1% — sourced from First Page Sage chatbot report (May 2026); includes Claude.ai general usage, not exclusively search-mode queries
AI search queries consume 10x energy of keyword search — attributed to Google internal estimate; exact figure not publicly disclosed in a primary source
Brave Leo / Kagi combined growing 30-40% YoY — directional estimate from industry coverage; no disclosed revenue or user figures from either company
